reasoning: The question asks whether daily average temperatures on future dates (typically late November to January) will be higher than on Oct 26. Since temperatures systematically decrease from October into the winter months in France (Gourdon), the expected value of the temperature difference $T_2 - T_1$ is negative. Assuming a mean difference of roughly -5 to -7 degrees Celsius and a standard deviation of the difference of around 5 degrees, the probability of the future date being warmer than Oct 26 is roughly 0.08 to 0.25, depending on the exact date. We estimate 0.15.
